title: Create PlacementPro Student Portal Application

requirements.text: Replace the existing health recommendation system with a student placement portal that manages student profiles, company listings, job postings, and application tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores student profiles with academic details (name, enrollment number, branch, CGPA, skills, resume URL)
Backend stores company information (name, description, eligibility criteria, CTC range)
Backend stores job postings linked to companies with application deadlines
Backend tracks student applications to jobs with status (applied, shortlisted, selected, rejected)
All data is persisted using stable storage in the Motoko actor

requirements.text: Create a student dashboard that displays the logged-in student's profile, shows available job postings they are eligible for, and lists their application history with current status
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows student's personal details, CGPA, and skills
Job listings display company name, role, CTC, eligibility criteria, and application deadline
Students can filter jobs by company, CTC range, or eligibility
Application history shows company name, role, application date, and current status with visual indicators
Dashboard is responsive and uses a professional placement portal design theme

requirements.text: Implement a job application flow where students can view job details and submit applications, with automatic eligibility checking based on CGPA and branch requirements
acceptanceCriteria: Backend validates student eligibility (CGPA threshold, branch match) before accepting applications
Students cannot apply to the same job twice
Application submission updates the student's application list and job's applicant count
Frontend shows clear error messages for ineligible applications
Successful applications display confirmation with next steps

requirements.text: Create an admin view that allows placement coordinators to add new companies, post job openings, and update application statuses for students
acceptanceCriteria: Backend provides admin-only functions to create companies and job postings
Backend allows updating application status (shortlist, select, reject)
Admin interface shows list of all applications grouped by job with student details
Admin can view student profiles and filter by eligibility for specific jobs
Admin functions are protected and only accessible to authorized principals

requirements.text: Design a professional placement portal interface with a cohesive visual theme using corporate colors (navy, teal, gold accents), clean typography, and a modern card-based layout that emphasizes clarity and professionalism
acceptanceCriteria: Interface uses a professional color scheme suitable for a placement portal (avoid generic blue/purple)
Typography and spacing create a clear hierarchy for job listings and student data
Card-based layouts are used for job postings, applications, and student profiles
Responsive design works seamlessly on desktop and tablet devices
Visual theme conveys trust, professionalism, and institutional credibility

requirements.text: Implement student profile creation and editing that allows users to input and update their academic details, skills, and resume link
acceptanceCriteria: Students can create their profile with name, enrollment number, branch, year, CGPA, skills array, and resume URL
Profile editing updates existing data in the backend
Backend validates required fields and data formats (CGPA range 0-10, valid enrollment number)
Frontend provides a clean form interface with validation feedback
Profile completion status is shown to encourage students to complete all fields

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not edit files in frontend/src/components/ui directory
Use stable storage for all persistent data in the Motoko backend
Preserve Internet Identity authentication flow for user login
nonGoals: Real-time chat or messaging between students and recruiters
Integration with external job boards or LinkedIn APIs
Video interview scheduling or conferencing features
Payment processing for premium job listings
Resume parsing or automated skill extraction
Third-party authentication providers beyond Internet Identity

required: Professional placement portal hero banner showing diverse students in professional attire with laptop and documents, modern office background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Icon illustration representing job applications with briefcase and checkmark (job-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Icon illustration representing student profile with graduation cap and user silhouette (profile-icon.dim_128x128.png)
